summary: Plan-only live PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly identifies this as an inventory shard rather than a dedupe cluster. All five open PRs are independent follow-up/triage items; no close, merge, label, comment, fix, or security-route action is recommended from this artifact.

actions.reason: Independent focused PR that should remain open for normal maintainer proof/review rather than inventory closeout.
Independent draft PR with its own review/proof path; keep open rather than close as duplicate, superseded, or low signal.
Independent active PR with maintainer/author workflow state; preserve it for normal review rather than inventory mutation.
Independent docs PR with failing checks and waiting-on-author status; keep open for ordinary maintainer/author follow-up.
Independent maintainer-owned repair PR with failing checks and proof needs; keep open for targeted maintainer triage.
